ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the player represents */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "bat_innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings batted */,
  "bowl_innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings bowled */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score by the player */,
  "five_wickets_haul" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls */,
  "bat_avg" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "bowl_avg" REAL /* Bowling average of the player */,
  "bat_strike_rate" REAL /* Batting strike rate of the player */,
  "bowl_eco" REAL /* Bowling economy rate of the player */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Total runs conceded by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player record was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* URL or reference to the player's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES player_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name or code of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country's cricket board */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country record was last updated */,
  "country_flag" TEXT /* URL or reference to the country's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "opponent_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the opponent */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., day, night) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match record was last updated */,
  "match_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the match */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name or ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "match_umpires" TEXT /* Names or IDs of the umpires who officiated the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_result FOREIGN KEY ("result") REFERENCES match_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_format FOREIGN KEY ("match_format") REFERENCES match_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type FOREIGN KEY ("match_type") REFERENCES match_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match type record was last updated */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the match type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the match result (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match result record was last updated */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the match result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the match format (e.g., day, night) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match format record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match format record was last updated */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the match format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_player_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of match statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "bat_innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings batted in the match */,
  "bowl_innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings bowled in the match */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored in the match */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken in the match */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in the match */,
  "five_wickets_haul" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls in the match */,
  "bat_avg" REAL /* Batting average in the match */,
  "bowl_avg" REAL /* Bowling average in the match */,
  "bat_strike_rate" REAL /* Batting strike rate in the match */,
  "bowl_eco" REAL /* Bowling economy rate in the match */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Runs conceded in the match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match player stats record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match player stats record was last updated */,
  "stats_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the player's performance in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was last updated */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_career_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the career period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the career period */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player was part of */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total matches played during the period */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored during the period */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken during the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player career history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player career history record was last updated */,
  "career_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the player's career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_career_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
